song.title: Be Thou Supreme
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Be Thou supreme, O Jesus Christ Nor creed, nor form, nor word Nor holy church, nor human love Compare with Thee, my Lord!
[V2] 2) Be Thou supreme, O Jesus Christ Thy love has conquered me Beneath Thy cross I die to self And live alone to Thee
[V3] 3) Be Thou supreme, O Jesus Christ My inmost being fill So shall I think as Thou dost think And will as Thou dost will
[V4] 4) Be Thou supreme, O Jesus Christ Thy life transfigure mine And through this veil of mortal flesh Lord, let Thy splendor shine
[V5] 5) Be Thou supreme, O Jesus Christ My soul exults in Thee To be Thy slave, to do Thy will Is my felicity
[E] 1) Be Thou supreme, O Jesus Christ Nor creed, nor form, nor word Nor holy church, nor human love Compare with Thee, my Lord!
2) Be Thou supreme, O Jesus Christ Thy love has conquered me Beneath Thy cross I die to self And live alone to Thee
3) Be Thou supreme, O Jesus Christ My inmost being fill So shall I think as Thou dost think And will as Thou dost will
4) Be Thou supreme, O Jesus Christ Thy life transfigure mine And through this veil of mortal flesh Lord, let Thy splendor shine
5) Be Thou supreme, O Jesus Christ My soul exults in Thee To be Thy slave, to do Thy will Is my felicity
